::: {.callout-tip}
**Lasso — Early vs Late** — `glmnet` (binomial) on **all** log1p OTUs; compare sparse OTUs to the AIC model (**no PCA needed** for lasso).
:::

[Lab exercises](../exercises/index.html) · [Solution](../exercises/solutions/day01-microbiome-classical.html) · [Download Rmd](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/s-peischl/ML_SS_2026/main/exercises/solutions/day01-microbiome-classical.Rmd)
